sections.paragraph:
Original: בּוצץ

Transliteration: bôtsêts

Phonetic: bo-tsates'

BDB Definition:

Bozez = "surpassing white: glistening"
  1. a rock formation near Michmash by which Jonathan approached the Philistine troop

Origin: from the same as H948

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
